questions.prompt: AP United States Government and Politics - Foundations of American Democracy: which concept is the best anchor for an AP CED-aligned exam task?

contextualization
argument

ignoring the source or data in the prompt
Repeat the definition of Foundations of American Democracy only.
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to contextualization; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.
